items.value: You: Hey Mike... I’m on my way home. Shouldn’t be long now.
You: What do you mean, buddy? You sound upset.
Mike: You were never really here, Dad... Today was my birthday. You didn’t even remember.
Mike: Mom would’ve remembered... she always did.
You: Oh God... Mike, I—I’m so sorry. I lost track of time. I didn’t mean to forget.
You: Just hang on, okay? I’m coming home right now. We’ll celebrate, I promise.
